baseline.final_answer: As of February 2025, Caren Marsh Doll is considered the oldest living Hollywood star and actress at 105 years old. Eva Marie Saint is also noted as being 100 years old in 2024 and turning 100 in July 2024, and another source states she is 100 years old as of February 2025.

evaluation.feedback: The answer contains factual claims about Caren Marsh Doll and Eva Marie Saint's ages and status as oldest living actress, but provides no citations to support these claims. This violates the grounding policy.
